title: Use application equipment to apply fumigant in confined spaces
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use application equipment to apply fumigant in confined spaces demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan fumigation

pcs.text: Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace.

pcs.text: Assess the facility and conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the facility and conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the facility and conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use.

pcs.text: Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest, facility and material to be treated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest, facility and material to be treated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest, facility and material to be treated.

pcs.text: Identify and select fumigant to be used and its application rate according to chemical label
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select fumigant to be used and its application rate according to chemical label?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select fumigant to be used and its application rate according to chemical label.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for fumigation in confined spaces
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for fumigation in confined spaces?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for fumigation in confined spaces.

pcs.text: Establish security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) according to fumigant safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) according to fumigant safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) according to fumigant safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan fumigation

elements.title: Prepare storage facility, equipment and fumigants for fumigation activity

pcs.text: Erect signage and barriers to control risk of inadvertent entry to facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Erect signage and barriers to control risk of inadvertent entry to facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Erect signage and barriers to control risk of inadvertent entry to facility.

pcs.text: Seal the facility and check the seal integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seal the facility and check the seal integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seal the facility and check the seal integrity.

pcs.text: Take appropriate measurements and calculations to ensure the concentration of fumigant will meet specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take appropriate measurements and calculations to ensure the concentration of fumigant will meet specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take appropriate measurements and calculations to ensure the concentration of fumigant will meet specification.

pcs.text: Check operational effectiveness of fumigation equipment according to operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check operational effectiveness of fumigation equipment according to operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check operational effectiveness of fumigation equipment according to operating procedures.

pcs.text: Calibrate fumigation equipment to deliver the correct rate of application according to chemical label and operating instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate fumigation equipment to deliver the correct rate of application according to chemical label and operating instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate fumigation equipment to deliver the correct rate of application according to chemical label and operating instructions.

pcs.text: Transport and store fumigants according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS) and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport and store fumigants according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS) and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport and store fumigants according to chemical label and safety data sheets (SDS) and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE for selected fumigant according to chemical label and SDS
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE for selected fumigant according to chemical label and SDS?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use PPE for selected fumigant according to chemical label and SDS.

pcs.text: Prepare fumigant according to chemical label and equipment operator instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare fumigant according to chemical label and equipment operator instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fumigant according to chemical label and equipment operator instructions.

pcs.text: Apply fumigant according to planned application method, pest management strategy and chemical label
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fumigant according to planned application method, pest management strategy and chemical label?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fumigant according to planned application method, pest management strategy and chemical label.

pcs.text: Monitor fumigation site during exposure time and prevent unauthorised access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor fumigation site during exposure time and prevent unauthorised access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor fumigation site during exposure time and prevent unauthorised access.

pcs.text: Maintain integrity of seals throughout the active fumigation period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain integrity of seals throughout the active fumigation period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain integrity of seals throughout the active fumigation period.

pcs.text: Respond to emergency situations according to workplace emergency procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Respond to emergency situations according to workplace emergency procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respond to emergency situations according to workplace emergency procedures.

pcs.text: Establish ventilation and re-entry times and risk controls according to chemical label and withholding periods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish ventilation and re-entry times and risk controls according to chemical label and withholding periods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish ventilation and re-entry times and risk controls according to chemical label and withholding periods.

pcs.text: Ventilate facility using appropriate equipment to remove fumigant in a safe and controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ventilate facility using appropriate equipment to remove fumigant in a safe and controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ventilate facility using appropriate equipment to remove fumigant in a safe and controlled manner.

pcs.text: Test for evidence of residual gas according to workplace procedures, and maximum residue limits for the material being treated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test for evidence of residual gas according to workplace procedures, and maximum residue limits for the material being treated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test for evidence of residual gas according to workplace procedures, and maximum residue limits for the material being treated.

pcs.text: Notify appropriate personnel of any further risk control measures required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify appropriate personnel of any further risk control measures required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify appropriate personnel of any further risk control measures required.

pcs.text: Collect and remove all equipment, sealants, fumigants and waste materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and remove all equipment, sealants, fumigants and waste materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and remove all equipment, sealants, fumigants and waste materials according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Remove signage and barriers according to site security measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove signage and barriers according to site security measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove signage and barriers according to site security measures.

pcs.text: Clean, decontaminate, check and store equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures, chemical labels, SDS and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, decontaminate, check and store equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures, chemical labels, SDS and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, decontaminate, check and store equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures, chemical labels, SDS and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of all waste according to chemical label instructions and workplace environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of all waste according to chemical label instructions and workplace environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of all waste according to chemical label instructions and workplace environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Record details of fumigation applications according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record details of fumigation applications according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record details of fumigation applications according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report safety incidents according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report safety incidents according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report safety incidents according to workplace procedures.
